mapper.select: select distinct b.user_id from tai_userinfo b,tai_userinfo c,tfp_filter_info d where c.user_id=#{user_id} and to_number(c.user_level) <= 9 and b.user_id=d.owner_id union all select distinct b.user_id from tai_userinfo b,tai_userinfo c,tfp_filter_info d where c.user_id=#{user_id} and b.user_id=d.owner_id and to_number(c.user_level) >=10 and to_number(b.user_level)<=to_number(c.user_level) and b.region_id in (select region_id from tai_userinfo where user_id=#{user_id} union all select distinct region_id from region_city_local where province_id=c.region_id union all select distinct city_id from region_city_local where province_id=c.region_id union all select distinct city_id from region_city_local where region_id=c.region_id)

select distinct b.user_id from tai_userinfo b,tai_userinfo c,tfp_filter_info d where c.user_id=#{user_id} and to_number(c.user_level) <= 9 and b.user_id=d.owner_id union all select distinct b.user_id from tai_userinfo b,tai_userinfo c,tfp_filter_info d where c.user_id=#{user_id} and to_number(c.user_level) >=10 and to_number(b.user_level)>=10 and b.user_id=d.owner_id and b.region_id in (select region_id from tai_userinfo where user_id=#{user_id} union all select distinct province_id from region_city_local where province_id in (select distinct province_id from region_city_local where (c.user_level=10 and province_id =c.region_id) or (c.user_level=11 and region_id =c.region_id) or (c.user_level=12 and city_id =c.region_id)) union all select distinct region_id from region_city_local where province_id in (select distinct province_id from region_city_local where (c.user_level=10 and province_id =c.region_id) or (c.user_level=11 and region_id =c.region_id) or (c.user_level=12 and city_id =c.region_id)) union all select distinct city_id from region_city_local where province_id in (select distinct province_id from region_city_local where (c.user_level=10 and province_id =c.region_id) or (c.user_level=11 and region_id =c.region_id) or (c.user_level=12 and city_id =c.region_id)) )

select distinct b.user_id from tai_userinfo b,tai_userinfo c,tfp_filter_info d where to_number(b.user_level)=to_number(c.user_level) and c.region_id=b.region_id and b.user_id=d.owner_id and c.user_id=#{user_id}
select option_key,option_value from taw_option_info where option_key='${AlarmCount}' or option_key='${AlarmPreload}' or option_key='${AlarmAutoLock}' or option_key='${AlarmAutoLockTime}'
mapper.delete: delete from taw_option_info where option_key='${AlarmCount}' or option_key='${AlarmPreload}' or option_key='${AlarmAutoLock}' or option_key='${AlarmAutoLockTime}'
mapper.select: select c.columns_value, t.status_value,u.zh_name,u.user_name,m.* from tfp_monitorviewinfo m , tfp_status_template t ,tfp_column_template c,nrmdb.tau_user u where m.status_disp_templet = t.template_id and m.col_disp_templet = c.template_id and m.window_owner=u.user_id and m.window_owner=#{user_id} and m.if_used=1 and m.window_type = 0

select t.template_id,t.template_name,t.description,t.owner_id,u.user_name,DATE_FORMAT(t.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %T') as create_time,t.columns_value from tfp_column_template t,nrmdb.tau_user u where u.user_id=t.owner_id
mapper.update: update tfp_column_template set template_name=#{template_name}, description=#{description}, columns_value=#{columns_value}, modify_time=STR_TO_DATE(#{modify_time},'%Y-%m-%d %T') where template_id=#{template_id}
mapper.select: select col_name_zh,msg_field from tfm_alarm_col_info where msg_field is not null
select option_key,option_value from taw_option_info where option_key='${option_key}'

select t.template_id,t.template_name,t.description,t.owner_id,u.user_name,DATE_FORMAT(t.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %T') create_time,t.status_value from Tfp_Status_Template t,nrmdb.tau_user u where u.user_id=t.owner_id
select col_name_zh,msg_field from tfm_alarm_status_info t where msg_field is not null

select alarm_text0 || alarm_text1 || alarm_text2 || alarm_text3 || alarm_text4 || alarm_text5 || alarm_text6 || alarm_text7 || alarm_text8 || alarm_text9 || alarm_text10 || alarm_text11 || alarm_text12 || alarm_text13 || alarm_text14 || alarm_text15 alarm_text from tfa_alarm_act where fp0=${fp0} and fp1=${fp1} and fp2=${fp2} and fp3=${fp3} and event_time=STR_TO_DATE('${event_time}','%Y-%m-%d %T') union all select alarm_text0 || alarm_text1 || alarm_text2 || alarm_text3 || alarm_text4 || alarm_text5 || alarm_text6 || alarm_text7 || alarm_text8 || alarm_text9 || alarm_text10 || alarm_text11 || alarm_text12 || alarm_text13 || alarm_text14 || alarm_text15 alarm_text from tfa_alarm_clr where fp0=${fp0} and fp1=${fp1} and fp2=${fp2} and fp3=${fp3} and event_time=STR_TO_DATE('${event_time}','%Y-%m-%d %T')
select sheet_send_rule from tfa_alarm_sla where fp0=${fp0} and fp1=${fp1} and fp2=${fp2} and fp3=${fp3}
select type,zh_name,vendor_text from vendor_name order by vendor_text
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 and id not in (0)
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1317 and valid=1 and id not in (0)
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9 and valid = 1 and txt not in ('A++客户','A+客户','A客户','B客户','C客户','me','AAA') order by txt
mapper.delete: delete from tfp_adv_matchcond where field_name in ('title_text','object_class','professional_type') and display_name='deleted'and vendor_id='${0}'
mapper.select: select field_name, condition_id from tfp_adv_matchcond where field_name in ('title_text', 'object_class', 'professional_type') and vendor_id = ${vendorId}
mapper.insert: insert into tfp_adv_matchcond(field_name,display_name,vendor_id) select field_name,'DELETE' as display_name, vendor_id from (select 'title_text' as field_name,vendor_name.type as vendor_id from vendor_name minus select field_name,vendor_id from tfp_adv_matchcond)

insert into tfp_adv_matchcond(field_name,display_name,vendor_id) select field_name,'DELETE' as display_name, vendor_id from (select 'object_class' as field_name,vendor_name.type as vendor_id from vendor_name minus select field_name,vendor_id from tfp_adv_matchcond)

insert into tfp_adv_matchcond(field_name,display_name,vendor_id) select field_name,'DELETE' as display_name, vendor_id from (select 'professional_type' as field_name,vendor_name.type as vendor_id from vendor_name minus select field_name,vendor_id from tfp_adv_matchcond)
mapper.select: select t.item_id, t.title_text, DBMS_LOB.substr(t.description, 6000, 1) as DESCRIPTION, tia3.zh_name vendor, tia2.txt professional, tia1.txt objectclass, t.vendor_id, t.professional_type, t.object_class, t.flow_img flow_img, t.flow_img flow_img_link from (select row_number() over(order by e1.item_id desc) arownum, d1.value title_text, d2.value object_class, d3.value professional_type, e1.description , e1.flow_img, e1.item_id, e1.vendor_id vendor_id from tfp_adv_key_code d1, tfp_adv_key_code d2, tfp_adv_key_code d3, tfp_adv_matchcond f1, tfp_adv_matchcond f2, tfp_adv_matchcond f3, tfp_advice_item e1 where d1.condition_id = f1.condition_id and d2.condition_id = f2.condition_id and d3.condition_id = f3.condition_id and f1.field_name = 'title_text' and f2.field_name = 'object_class' and f3.field_name = 'professional_type' and d1.item_id = d2.item_id and d1.item_id = d3.item_id and d1.item_id = e1.item_id) t left join tia_alarm_dict tia1 on t.object_class = to_char(tia1.id) and tia1.type = 9 left join tia_alarm_dict tia2 on t.professional_type = to_char(tia2.id) and tia2.type = 1001 left join vendor_name tia3 on t.vendor_id = tia3.type

select * from (select t.item_id, t.professional_type, t.title_text, t.description, tia3.zh_name vendor, tia2.txt professional, tia1.txt objectclass, t.vendor_id, t.object_class, t.flow_img flow_img, t.flow_img flow_img_link from (select row_number() over(order by e1.item_id desc) arownum, d1.value title_text, d2.value object_class, d3.value professional_type, e1.description, e1.flow_img, e1.item_id, e1.vendor_id vendor_id from tfp_adv_key_code d1, tfp_adv_key_code d2, tfp_adv_key_code d3, tfp_adv_matchcond f1, tfp_adv_matchcond f2, tfp_adv_matchcond f3, tfp_advice_item e1 where d1.condition_id = f1.condition_id and d2.condition_id = f2.condition_id and d3.condition_id = f3.condition_id and f1.field_name = 'title_text' and f2.field_name = 'object_class' and f3.field_name = 'professional_type' and d1.item_id = d2.item_id and d1.item_id = d3.item_id and d1.item_id = e1.item_id) t left join tia_alarm_dict tia1 on t.object_class = to_char(tia1.id) and tia1.type = 9 left join tia_alarm_dict tia2 on t.professional_type = to_char(tia2.id) and tia2.type = 1001 left join vendor_name tia3 on t.vendor_id = tia3.type) where object_class = '${objectClass}' and vendor_id = '${vendorId}' and title_text = '${titleText}' and professional_type = '${professionalType}'
mapper.update: update tfp_adv_key_code set value='${value}' where item_id=${item_id} and condition_id='${condition_id}'
mapper.select: select m.window_id, m.window_name, m.window_type, m.window_owner, u.user_name, DATE_FORMAT(m.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %T') create_time, m.window_attribute, m.if_used, m.childwindow_show, m.col_disp_templet, m.status_disp_templet, m.filter_id_list, m.note, DATE_FORMAT(m.latest_time, '%Y-%m-%d %T') latest_time, c.columns_value, s.status_value from tfp_monitorviewinfo m, nrmdb.tau_user u, tfp_status_template s, tfp_column_template c where u.user_id = m.window_owner and m.status_disp_templet = s.template_id and m.col_disp_templet = c.template_id and m.window_type in (0, 1) and m.if_used in (0, 1) and m.window_attribute in (0, 1)

select m.window_id, m.window_name, m.window_type, m.window_owner, u.user_name, m.create_time, m.window_attribute, m.if_used, m.childwindow_show, m.col_disp_templet, m.status_disp_templet, m.filter_id_list, m.note, m.latest_time, c.columns_value, s.status_value from tfp_monitorviewinfo m, nrmdb.tau_user u, tfp_status_template s, tfp_column_template c where u.user_id = m.window_owner and m.status_disp_templet = s.template_id and m.col_disp_templet = c.template_id
${condition}

select asd.window_id, asd.window_name, asd.window_type, asd.window_owner, asd.user_name, asd.create_time, asd.window_attribute, asd.if_used, asd.window_bar_type, asd.ack_flag, asd.col_disp_templet, asd.status_disp_templet, asd.note, asd.latest_time, asd.columns_value, asd.status_value, asd.filter_id_list, group_concat(asd.filter_name) as filter_name_list from (select m.window_id, m.window_name, m.window_type, m.window_owner, u.user_name, DATE_FORMAT(m.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %T') create_time, m.window_attribute, m.if_used, m.window_bar_type, m.ack_flag, m.col_disp_templet, m.status_disp_templet, m.filter_id_list, f.filter_name, m.note, DATE_FORMAT(m.latest_time, '%Y-%m-%d %T') latest_time, c.columns_value, s.status_value from tfp_monitorviewinfo m, nrmdb.tau_user u, tfp_status_template s, tfp_column_template c, alarm_rule_define f where u.user_id = m.window_owner and m.status_disp_templet = s.template_id and instr(m.filter_id_list, f.filter_id) > 0 and m.col_disp_templet = c.template_id and m.window_type in (0) and m.if_used in (1) and m.window_attribute in (0, 1) and m.window_owner = '${userId}' ) asd
group by asd.window_id, asd.window_name, asd.window_type, asd.window_owner, asd.user_name, asd.create_time, asd.window_attribute, asd.if_used, asd.window_bar_type, asd.ack_flag, asd.col_disp_templet, asd.status_disp_templet, asd.note, asd.latest_time, asd.columns_value, asd.status_value, asd.filter_id_list

SELECT m.window_id, m.window_name, m.window_type, m.window_owner, u.user_name, DATE_FORMAT(m.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %T') create_time, m.window_attribute, m.if_used, m.childwindow_show, m.col_disp_templet, m.status_disp_templet, m.filter_id_list, m.note, DATE_FORMAT(m.latest_time, '%Y-%m-%d %T') latest_time, group_concat(f.filter_id) AS filter_id_list, group_concat(f.filter_name) AS filter_name_list, c.columns_value, s.status_value FROM tfp_monitorviewinfo m, nrmdb.tau_user u, tfp_status_template s, tfp_column_template c, alarm_rule_define f WHERE u.user_id = m.window_owner AND m.status_disp_templet = s.template_id AND m.col_disp_templet = c.template_id AND instr(m.filter_id_list, f.filter_id) > 0 AND (( m.window_type IN (1) AND m.if_used IN (1) AND m.window_attribute IN (0, 1) AND m.window_owner ='${userId}') OR ( m.if_used IN (1) AND m.window_attribute IN (1) AND m.window_owner !='${userId}')) GROUP BY m.window_id, m.window_name, m.window_type, m.window_owner, u.user_name, m.create_time, m.window_attribute, m.if_used, m.childwindow_show, m.col_disp_templet, m.status_disp_templet, m.note, m.latest_time, c.columns_value, s.status_value
mapper.delete: delete from tfp_monitorviewinfo where window_id in (${windowIds})
mapper.insert: insert into tfp_monitorviewinfo (window_id, window_name, window_type, window_owner, create_time, window_attribute, if_used, childwindow_show, col_disp_templet, status_disp_templet, filter_id_list, note) values (${windowId}, '${windowName}', '${windowType}', '${userName}', sysdate(), '${windowAttribute}', '${ifUsed}', '${childwindowShow}', ${col_disp_templet}, ${status_disp_templet}, '${filter_id_list}', '${note}')
mapper.select: select ID ,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=${type} and valid=${valid} order by txt
select filter_id id,attribute_value value from tfp_ex_ticketfwd where attribute_name='${name}'
mapper.update: update tfp_ex_ticketfwd set attribute_value='${value}' where attribute_name='${name}' and filter_id =${filter_id}
mapper.delete: delete from tfp_ex_ticketfwd where attribute_name='${name}' and filter_id = ${filter_id}
mapper.select: select remark_id,fp0,fp1,fp2,fp3,int_id,object_class,user_id,remark_time,remark_txt from tfa_remark where fp0=#{fp0} and fp1=#{fp1} and fp2=#{fp2} and fp3=#{fp3}

select t1.*,t2.operator_user_name as submitreview_user,t2.operator_time as submitreview_time,t3.operator_status from standard_roster_record t1 left join (select a.roster_int_id, a.operator_user_name, max(a.operator_time) as operator_time, a.operator_status from standard_roster_status a where a.operator_status = 2 group by a.roster_int_id, a.operator_user_name, a.operator_status) t2 on t1.roster_int_id = t2.roster_int_id left join (select a.* from standard_roster_status a, (select roster_int_id, max(operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status group by roster_int_id) c where a.roster_int_id = c.roster_int_id and a.operator_time = c.operator_time) t3 on t1.roster_int_id = t3.roster_int_id where t1.file_type = ${file_type} order by t1.import_time desc
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 AND valid=1
select id,txt FROM tia_alarm_dict WHERE type = 9 AND valid = 1 and txt not in ('A++客户','A+客户','A客户','B客户','C客户','me','AAA') order by txt
select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type > 0 and use_type = 0 order by zh_name
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=7 AND valid=1 and id in (1,100)

select * from (select type id,zh_name txt,'厂家' as type_name,99999 as type from vendor_name where type >= 0 and type in (0,1,4,7,8,9,11,12,50,51,52,201,202,203,953,710) order by zh_name) union all select id,txt,'专业' as type_name,type from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 and valid=1 union all select * from ( select id,upper(txt),type_name,type from tia_alarm_dict where type=9 and valid=1 and id in (100,101,102,105,108,110,111,112,121,122,124,130,131,161,200,201,301,400,900,1001,1002,2001,2010,30011,30013,30214,6000,6010,6100,6101,6102,6103,6109,6111,6112,6114,6116,6118,8101,8102,8103,8104,8105,8106,8107,9200,9201,9300,10003,14010,14301,14302,14129,14130,14131,14134,14303,14304,14305,14306,140002,140003,20150,20151) order by txt) union all select id,txt,'网络类型' as type_name,type from tia_alarm_dict where type=1037 and valid=1 union all select id,txt,'梳理表类型' as type_name,type from tia_alarm_dict where type=7 and valid=1 and id in (1,100)

select t1.*, t2.operator_user_name as submitreview_user, t2.operator_time as submitreview_time, t3.operator_status from standard_roster_record t1 left join (select a.roster_int_id,a.operator_user_name,max(a.operator_time) as operator_time,a.operator_status from standard_roster_status a where a.operator_status = 2 group by a.roster_int_id,a.operator_user_name,a.operator_status )t2 on t1.roster_int_id=t2.roster_int_id left join (select a.* from standard_roster_status a ,(select roster_int_id,max(operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status group by roster_int_id ) c where a.roster_int_id=c.roster_int_id and a.operator_time=c.operator_time )t3 on t1.roster_int_id=t3.roster_int_id ${v0} order by t1.import_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into standard_roster_status (roster_int_id, operator_status, operator_user,operator_user_name, operator_time, operator_note) values (${roster_int_id}, ${operator_status}, ${operator_user},'${operator_user_name}',sysdate(), '${operator_note}')
insert into standard_roster_status (roster_int_id, operator_status, operator_user,operator_user_name, operator_time, operator_note) values (${v0},${v1},${v2},'${v3}',sysdate(),'${v4}')
insert into standard_roster_status (roster_int_id, operator_status, operator_user,operator_user_name, operator_time, operator_note) values (${v0},${v1},${v2},'${v3}',sysdate()+1/24/60/60,'${v4}')
mapper.update: update standard_roster_record set enabled_status=2 where professional_type='${v0}' and vendor_id='${v1}' and ne_type='${v2}' and file_type='${v3}' and enabled_status=1
update standard_roster_record set enabled_status=1 where roster_int_id=${v0}
mapper.select: select distinct standard_alarm_id from standard_roster_content where roster_int_id = ${roster_int_id}

select f.filter_id, f.filter_name, f.module_id, f.owner_id, u.user_name, f.create_time, f.latest_time, f.filter_memo, f.module_id, f.share_regions, f.share_users, f.is_valid, f.is_private, c1.def_id c1_def_id, c1.value c1_value, c2.def_id c2_def_id, c2.value c2_value from tai_userinfo u, tfp_filter_info f,tfp_filter_define f1,tai_condition c left join (select c11.condition_id, c11.def_id,d1.def_name,d1.zh_name,c11.value,c11.reverse from tia_condition_def d1, tai_condition1 c11 where d1.def_id=c11.def_id)c1 on c.condition_id=c1.condition_id left join (select c22.condition_id, c22.def_id,d1.def_name,d1.zh_name,c22.value,c22.reverse from tia_condition_def d1, tai_condition2 c22 where d1.def_id=c22.def_id)c2 on c.condition_id=c2.condition_id where f.owner_id = u.user_id and u.deleted = 0 and f.module_id> 0 and f.filter_id=f1.filter_id and f1.condition_id = c.condition_id and (c1.def_id = 65 or c2.def_id = 65) order by f.module_id

select a.*, pro.txt professional_type_name, b.derive_clr_rule, b.alarm_text, b.derive_title_text, b.derive_org_severity, b.derive_standard_alarm_id, b.derive_standard_alarm_name, b.professional_type derive_professional_type, b.vendor_id derive_vendor_id, b.eqp_object_class derive_eqp_object_class, b.object_class derive_object_class, b.active_timeout derive_active_timeout, c.filter_condition, c.is_main_alarm from tfa_gaia_rule_file a left join tfa_gaia_rule_derive b on a.ser_file_id = b.ser_file_id left join tfa_gaia_rule_sub_alarm c on c.ser_file_id = a.ser_file_id left join (select * from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1001 and valid = 1) pro on pro.id = a.professional_type where a.in_use in (0, 1) order by change_time desc, c.is_main_alarm desc

select a.* from standard_roster_column a join standard_roster_record b on a.professional_type = b.professional_type and a.vendor_id = b.vendor_id and a.ne_type = b.ne_type where b.roster_int_id=${roster_int_id} order by a.col_index
select count(*) as count from standard_roster_content where roster_int_id=${roster_int_id}

select * from ( select 'PreID' as type, roster_int_id from standard_roster_record where import_time < STR_TO_DATE('${v0}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and professional_type='${v1}' and vendor_id='${v2}' and ne_type='${v3}' and org_type='${v4}' and file_type='${v5}' order by import_time desc ) where rownum <2 union all select * from ( select 'EnableID' as type, roster_int_id from standard_roster_record where enabled_status=1 and file_type=2 and professional_type='${v1}' and vendor_id='${v2}' and ne_type='${v3}' and org_type='${v4}') where rownum <2

select 'Current' as temporaryfiletype,${v0} as temporarymatch,${v1} from standard_roster_content where roster_int_id=${v2} union all select 'Pre' as temporaryfiletype,${v0} as temporarymatch,${v1} from standard_roster_content where roster_int_id=${v3} union all select 'Enable' as temporaryfiletype,${v0} as temporarymatch,${v1} from standard_roster_content where roster_int_id=${v4} union all select 'Update' as temporaryfiletype, t.* from (select ${v0} as temporaryKey,${v1} from standard_roster_content where roster_int_id=${v2}) t, (select ${v0} as temporaryKey,${v1} from standard_roster_content where roster_int_id=${v3}) t1 where t.temporarykey=t1.temporarykey and ${v5}
mapper.delete: delete tfm_alarm_stand_info where professional_type =${v0} and vendor_id =${v1} and Eqp_Object_Class = ${v2} and file_type=${v3}
mapper.insert: insert into tfm_alarm_stand_info (info_id,mapping_type, alarm_title_text, professional_type, vendor_id, vendor_severity, vendor_version, alarm_explanation, effect_ne, effect_service, eqp_object_class, file_name, logic_type, logic_sub_type, object_class, redefine_severity,org_severity,org_type, redefine_type, related_flag, standard_alarm_id, standard_alarm_name, send_jt_flag, object_class_text, eqp_object_class_text, probable_cause, probable_cause_oid, layer_rate, layer_rate_text, alarm_check, Rule_Seq,alarm_explanation_addition,locate_name,time_stamp,file_type) select a.info_id,a.mapping_type, a.alarm_title_text, a.professional_type, a.vendor_id, a.vendor_severity, a.vendor_version, a.alarm_explanation, a.effect_ne, a.effect_service, a.eqp_object_class, a.file_name, a.logic_alarm_type, a.logic_sub_alarm_type, a.object_class, a.org_severity,a.org_severity,a.org_type, a.org_type, a.related_flag, a.standard_alarm_id, a.standard_alarm_name, a.send_jt_flag, a.object_class_text, a.eqp_object_class_text, a.probable_cause, a.probable_cause_oid, a.layer_rate, a.layer_rate_text, a.alarm_check, a.Rule_Seq,a.alarm_explanation_addition,a.alarm_explanation_addition,sysdate(),b.file_type from standard_roster_content a left join standard_roster_record b on a.roster_int_id=b.roster_int_id where a.roster_int_id=${v0} and b.file_type=${v1}
mapper.update: update tfm_alarm_stand_info a set (mapping_type, alarm_title_text, professional_type, vendor_id, vendor_severity, vendor_version, alarm_explanation, effect_ne, effect_service, eqp_object_class, file_name, logic_type, logic_sub_type, object_class, redefine_severity,org_severity,org_type,redefine_type, related_flag, standard_alarm_id, standard_alarm_name, send_jt_flag, object_class_text, eqp_object_class_text, probable_cause, probable_cause_oid, layer_rate, layer_rate_text, alarm_check, Rule_Seq,alarm_explanation_addition,locate_name,time_stamp) = (select mapping_type, alarm_title_text, professional_type, vendor_id, vendor_severity, vendor_version, alarm_explanation, effect_ne, effect_service, eqp_object_class, file_name, logic_alarm_type, logic_sub_alarm_type, object_class, org_severity, org_severity,org_type,org_type, related_flag, standard_alarm_id, standard_alarm_name, send_jt_flag, object_class_text, eqp_object_class_text, probable_cause, probable_cause_oid, layer_rate, layer_rate_text, alarm_check, Rule_Seq,alarm_explanation_addition,alarm_explanation_addition,sysdate() from standard_roster_content b where a.info_id =b.info_id) where a.info_id = ${info_id}
mapper.select: select t1.*, t2.operator_user_name as review_user, t2.operator_time as review_time, t3.operator_user_name as release_user, t3.operator_time as release_time, t4.operator_user_name as submitreview_user, t4.operator_time as submitreview_time from standard_roster_record t1 left join (select a.roster_int_id,a.operator_user_name,max(a.operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status a where a.operator_status = 5 group by a.roster_int_id,a.operator_user_name )t2 on t1.roster_int_id=t2.roster_int_id left join (select b.roster_int_id,b.operator_user_name,max(b.operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status b where b.operator_status = 7 group by b.roster_int_id,b.operator_user_name )t3 on t1.roster_int_id=t3.roster_int_id left join (select b.roster_int_id,b.operator_user_name,max(b.operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status b where b.operator_status = 2 group by b.roster_int_id,b.operator_user_name )t4 on t1.roster_int_id=t4.roster_int_id where t1.enabled_status=1 ${v0} order by t1.import_time desc

select a.*,b.mobilephone from ( select t1.*, t2.operator_user as userid, t2.operator_user_name as submitreview_user, t2.operator_time as submitreview_time, nvl(t2.operator_status,0) as operator_status from standard_roster_record t1,standard_roster_status t2, (select roster_int_id, max(operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status group by roster_int_id) t3 where t1.roster_int_id = t2.roster_int_id and t2.roster_int_id = t3.roster_int_id and t2.operator_time = t3.operator_time and (t2.operator_status = ${v1}) ${v0} )a left join tai_userinfo b on a.userid=b.user_id order by a.submitreview_time desc

select t1.*, t2.operator_user_name as submitreview_user, t2.operator_time as submitreview_time, t3.operator_user_name as review_user, t3.operator_time as review_time, nvl(t3.operator_status,0) as operator_status from standard_roster_record t1 left join (select a.roster_int_id,a.operator_user_name,a.operator_status,max(a.operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status a where a.operator_status = 2 group by a.roster_int_id,a.operator_user_name,a.operator_status )t2 on t1.roster_int_id=t2.roster_int_id left join (select a.* from standard_roster_status a ,(select roster_int_id,max(operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status group by roster_int_id ) c where a.roster_int_id=c.roster_int_id and a.operator_time=c.operator_time )t3 on t1.roster_int_id=t3.roster_int_id where t2.operator_status=${v1} and nvl(t3.operator_status,0) in (5,7) ${v0} order by t3.operator_time desc

select a.*,b.mobilephone from ( select t1.*, t2.operator_user as userid, t2.operator_user_name as review_user, t2.operator_time as review_time, t4.operator_user_name as submitreview_user, t4.operator_time as submitreview_time, nvl(t2.operator_status,0) as operator_status from standard_roster_record t1,standard_roster_status t2, (select roster_int_id, max(operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status group by roster_int_id) t3,(select roster_int_id,operator_user_name,operator_status,max(operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status group by roster_int_id, operator_user_name,operator_status) t4 where t1.roster_int_id = t2.roster_int_id and t1.roster_int_id=t4.roster_int_id and t4.operator_status=2 and t2.roster_int_id = t3.roster_int_id and t2.operator_time = t3.operator_time and t2.operator_status = ${v1} ${v0} ) a left join tai_userinfo b on a.userid=b.user_id order by a.review_time desc

select t1.*, t2.operator_user_name as review_user, t2.operator_time as review_time, t3.operator_user_name as release_user, t3.operator_time as release_time, nvl(t3.operator_status,0) as operator_status, t4.operator_user_name as submitreview_user, t4.operator_time as submitreview_time from standard_roster_record t1 left join (select a.roster_int_id,a.operator_user_name,a.operator_status,max(a.operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status a where a.operator_status = 5 group by a.roster_int_id,a.operator_user_name,a.operator_status )t2 on t1.roster_int_id=t2.roster_int_id left join (select b.roster_int_id,b.operator_user_name,b.operator_status,max(b.operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status b where b.operator_status = 7 group by b.roster_int_id,b.operator_user_name,b.operator_status )t3 on t1.roster_int_id=t3.roster_int_id left join (select c.roster_int_id,c.operator_user_name,max(c.operator_time) as operator_time from standard_roster_status c where c.operator_status = 2 group by c.roster_int_id,c.operator_user_name )t4 on t1.roster_int_id=t4.roster_int_id where t2.operator_status=${v1} and nvl(t3.operator_status,0)=${v2} ${v0} order by t3.operator_time desc

select a.*,b.user_name as First_Confirm_UserName,c.txt as Professional_Name from tpa_alarm_unstandard_sum a left join tai_userinfo b on a.first_confirm_userid=b.user_id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 AND valid=1 ) c on a.professional_type=c.id

select a.*,b.user_name as First_Confirm_UserName,c.txt as Professional_Name from tpa_alarm_unstandard_sum a left join tai_userinfo b on a.first_confirm_userid=b.user_id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 AND valid=1 ) c on a.professional_type=c.id where sum_level=${v0} and first_result >=STR_TO_DATE('${v1}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and first_result <=STR_TO_DATE('${v2}','%Y-%m-%d %T')

select t1.txt as professional_name,t.vendor_name,t.ne_type_name,t4.txt as object_class_name,t2.txt as eqp_object_class_name,t.eqp_label,t.ne_label, t.vendor_severity as vendor_severity_name,t.vendor_type as vendor_type_name,t3.txt as standard_flag_name,t.alarm_title_text,t.event_time,t5.txt org_type_name, t.alarm_text0||t.alarm_text1||t.alarm_text2||t.alarm_text3||t.alarm_text4||t.alarm_text5||t.alarm_text6||t.alarm_text7||t.alarm_text8 as alarm_text from tfa_alarm_unstandard t left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 AND valid=1 ) t1 on t.professional_type=t1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9 and valid = 1) t2 on t.eqp_object_class=t2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1031 and valid = 1) t3 on t.standard_flag=t3.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9 and valid = 1) t4 on t.object_class=t4.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 7 and valid = 1 and id in (1,100)) t5 on t.org_type=t5.id where t.event_time >=STR_TO_DATE(${startevent_time},'%Y-%m-%d %T') and t.event_time <=STR_TO_DATE(${endevent_time},'%Y-%m-%d %T') and t.professional_type=${professional_type} and t.vendor_id=${vendor_id} and t.org_type=${org_type} and t.alarm_title_text=${alarm_title_text}

select t1.txt as professional_name,t.vendor_name,t.ne_type_name,t4.txt as object_class_name,t2.txt as eqp_object_class_name,t.eqp_label,t.ne_label, t.vendor_severity as vendor_severity_name,t.vendor_type as vendor_type_name,t3.txt as standard_flag_name,t.alarm_title_text,t.event_time,t5.txt org_type_name, t.alarm_text0||t.alarm_text1||t.alarm_text2||t.alarm_text3||t.alarm_text4||t.alarm_text5||t.alarm_text6||t.alarm_text7||t.alarm_text8 as alarm_text from tfa_alarm_unstandard t left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 AND valid=1 ) t1 on t.professional_type=t1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9 and valid = 1) t2 on t.eqp_object_class=t2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1031 and valid = 1) t3 on t.standard_flag=t3.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9 and valid = 1) t4 on t.object_class=t4.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 7 and valid = 1 and id in (1,100)) t5 on t.org_type=t5.id where t.event_time >=STR_TO_DATE('${v0}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and t.event_time <=STR_TO_DATE('${v1}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and t.professional_type = ${v2} and t.vendor_id = ${v3} and t.alarm_title_text = '${v4}' and t.object_class = ${v5} and t.org_type = ${v6}

select t1.txt as professional_name,t.vendor_name,t2.txt as eqp_object_class_name,t.eqp_label, t.event_time,t.alarm_title_text, t.vendor_severity as vendor_severity_name,t5.txt org_type_name, t.alarm_text0||t.alarm_text1||t.alarm_text2||t.alarm_text3||t.alarm_text4||t.alarm_text5||t.alarm_text6||t.alarm_text7||t.alarm_text8 as alarm_text from tfa_alarm_unstandard t left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 AND valid=1 ) t1 on t.professional_type=t1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9 and valid = 1) t2 on t.eqp_object_class=t2.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 7 and valid = 1 and id in (1,100)) t5 on t.org_type=t5.id where t.event_time >=STR_TO_DATE('${startevent_time}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and t.event_time <=STR_TO_DATE('${endevent_time}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and t.professional_type=${professional_type} and t.vendor_id=${vendor_id} and t.alarm_title_text=${alarm_title_text} and t.org_type=${org_type}
mapper.update: update tpa_alarm_unstandard_sum set first_confirm_userid=${first_confirm_userid},first_confirm_time=sysdate() where first_result=${first_result} and ne_type=${ne_type} and sum_level=${sum_level} and professional_type=${professional_type} and vendor_id=${vendor_id} and t.org_type=${org_type} and alarm_title_text=${alarm_title_text}
mapper.select: select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 AND valid=1
select id,upper(txt) txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9 and id >10 and valid =1 order by txt
select type id,upper(zh_name) txt from vendor_name where type > 0 order by zh_name
select id,upper(txt) txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9 and id >10 and valid =1 order by txt
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 6 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 7 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1006 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1007 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1008 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1009 and valid = 1

select * from (select A1.*, rownum RN from (select a.professional_name professional_type, a.vendor_name vendor_id, a.ne_type_name eqp_object_class, a.version, b.mapping_type, b.alarm_title_text, b.probable_cause, b.vendor_severity, b.vendor_version, b.alarm_explanation_addition, b.standard_alarm_id, b.info_id, b.roster_int_id, c.txt object_class, d.txt org_severity, e.txt org_type, f.txt logic_alarm_type, g.txt logic_sub_alarm_type, h.txt effect_ne, i.txt effect_service from standard_roster_record a inner join standard_roster_content b on a.roster_int_id = b.roster_int_id left join (select id, txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9 and valid=1) c on b.object_class=c.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 6 and valid = 1 ) d on b.org_severity=d.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 7 and valid = 1 ) e on b.org_type=e.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1006 and valid = 1 ) f on b.logic_alarm_type=f.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1007 and valid = 1 ) g on b.logic_sub_alarm_type=g.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1008 and valid = 1 ) h on b.effect_ne=h.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1009 and valid = 1 ) i on b.effect_service=i.id where a.enabled_status = 1 ${v0}) A1 where rownum <= ${v2}) where RN >${v1}
select count(*) totalcount from standard_roster_record a, standard_roster_content b where a.roster_int_id = b.roster_int_id and a.enabled_status = 1 ${v0}
select * from standard_roster_content where info_id=${0}
select professional_name,professional_type,vendor_id,vendor_name,ne_type,ne_type_name,col_name_zn,col_name_en,key_col from standard_roster_column where 1=1
select * from standard_roster_column where 1=1 and vendor_id =${vendor_id} and ne_type =${ne_type}
select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type >= 0 order by zh_name
mapper.delete: delete from standard_roster_column where vendor_id =${vendor_id} and ne_type =${ne_type}
mapper.select: select id,the_year,holiday_name,to_char(holiday_start,'%Y-%m-%d %T') holiday_start,to_char(holiday_end,'%Y-%m-%d %T') holiday_end,enable from tfa_eoms_holiday where enable=1
select a.group_id id,a.group_name txt,a.memo,a.owner_id,b.user_name from tai_negrp_info a left join tai_userinfo b on a.owner_id=b.user_id

select a.id,b.depname txt from (select distinct yhs id from objects union select distinct maintain_group id from drop_alarm_maintain_group) a left join eoms_sm_dep b on b.pid=a.id order by b.depname,a.id
select sheet_t2_id id,sheet_t2_name txt from tfp_sheet_obj_t2 where is_valid=1 order by sheet_t2_name
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=12
select t.group_id, t.group_name, t.memo, t.owner_id from tai_groupinfo t
select t.user_id, t.user_name, t.mobilephone, t.email, u.group_id from nrmdb.tau_user t left join tai_usrgroup u on t.user_id = u.user_id
select option_value from taw_option_info where trim(option_key) = '${user_name}.SMSTemplate'

SELECT IFNULL(IFNULL(msg_field,db_field),msg_field) AS db_field, col_name_zh, db_col_type, col_group, map_content, mem FROM tfm_alarm_col_info WHERE ( msg_field IS NOT NULL OR db_field = 'rule_name') AND col_disp_type = 1
select email from tai_userinfo where user_id = '${user_id}'
select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type >= 0 order by zh_name
select id,txt FROM tia_alarm_dict WHERE type = 9 AND valid = 1 and txt not in ('A++客户','A+客户','A客户','B客户','C客户','me','AAA') order by txt
select * from tfa_gaia_relate_condition
select ID id, txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 30 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 and valid=1
select col_name_zh,msg_field from tfm_alarm_col_info where msg_field is not null

select a.ser_file_id,a.directorys,a.file_name,a.opt_person,a.new_file,a.change_time,a.in_use,a.change_time_str,a.alarm_id_num, a.rule_name,a.relation_type,a.professional_type,a.vendor_id,a.ruledesc,a.user_id,a.is_local_rule,a.relation_condition,a.relation_position_info,a.use_resources,a.pro_resconfig, a.ext_resconfig,a.alarm_content,a.rule_def_user,a.rule_def_phone,a.eqp_object_class, a.topic_idlist, a.filter_id, a.phone_num, a.fire_point, a.active_time_out, a.count_type, a.thresh_hold, a.thresh_hold_refer_sql, a.change_status, a.project_surpress, a.create_time, a.dealed_process_alias, a.relation_name, a.whilelist_province, a.blacklist_province, a.whitelist_province, a.reason_type, b.derive_clr_rule, b.alarm_text, b.derive_title_text, b.derive_org_severity, b.derive_standard_alarm_id, b.derive_standard_alarm_name, b.professional_type derive_professional_type, b.vendor_id derive_vendor_id, b.eqp_object_class derive_eqp_object_class, b.object_class derive_object_class, b.active_timeout derive_active_timeout, c.filter_condition, c.is_main_alarm from tfa_gaia_rule_file a left join tfa_gaia_rule_derive b on a.ser_file_id = b.ser_file_id left join tfa_gaia_rule_sub_alarm c on c.ser_file_id = a.ser_file_id where a.rule_name like lower('%${keyword}%') and a.in_use in (${inUse}) and a.professional_type in (${professionalType}) order by change_time ${sort}, c.is_main_alarm desc
select ser_file_id,filter_name, sub_alarm_name,relation,clear_alarm_join,Filter_condition,Is_Main_Alarm from tfa_gaia_rule_sub_alarm where ser_file_id in (${v0})
select * from tfa_gaia_rule_filter_condition where 1=1 order by Change_time desc
select * from tfa_gaia_rule_filter_condition where filter_name ='${v0}'
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1001 AND valid=1 and id <=5
select id,txt FROM tia_alarm_dict WHERE type = 9 AND valid = 1 and txt not in ('A++客户','A+客户','A客户','B客户','C客户','me','AAA') order by txt
select distinct alarm_title_text txt FROM tfm_alarm_stand_info where 1=1 ${v0}
select distinct alarm_title_text txt,info_id id from tfm_alarm_stand_info where vendor_id=${v0} and eqp_object_class=${v1} and lower(alarm_title_text) like lower('%${v2}%')
select distinct alarm_title_text txt,info_id id from tfm_alarm_stand_info where vendor_id=${v0} and object_class=${v1} and lower(alarm_title_text) like lower('%${v2}%')"
select distinct standard_alarm_id txt,info_id id FROM tfm_alarm_stand_info where standard_alarm_id is not null and 1=1 ${v0}

select rule_name,opt_person,new_file,create_time,change_time,in_use,ruledesc,professional_type,rule_def_user ,rule_def_phone,active_time_out,thresh_hold,directorys,file_name,project_surpress,relation_name ,whitelist_province,blacklist_province from tfa_gaia_rule_file where ser_file_id =${v0}
select RULE_NAME from TFA_GAIA_RULE_FILE where Rule_NAME ='${v0}'
mapper.update: update TFA_GAIA_RULE_FILE set in_use =${v1},change_time=STR_TO_DATE('${v2}','%Y-%m-%d %T'),opt_person='${v3}' where ser_file_id =${v0}
update TFA_GAIA_RULE_FILE set in_use =${v1},change_time=STR_TO_DATE('${v2}','%Y-%m-%d %T'),opt_person='${v3}' ,change_status=1 where ser_file_id =${v0}
mapper.select: select derive_title_text,alarm_text,derive_standard_alarm_name,derive_clr_rule,derive_standard_alarm_id ,derive_org_severity from tfa_gaia_rule_derive where ser_file_id=${v0}
select new_file,directorys,file_name from tfa_gaia_rule_file where ser_file_id=${v0}
select count_type,thresh_hold,fire_point from tfa_gaia_rule_file where ser_file_id=${v0}
select distinct standard_alarm_name txt,info_id id FROM tfm_alarm_stand_info where standard_alarm_name is not null and 1=1 ${v0}
select distinct standard_alarm_name txt from tfm_alarm_stand_info where vendor_id=${v0} and eqp_object_class=${v1} and standard_alarm_name like lower('%${v2}%')
select distinct standard_alarm_name txt from tfm_alarm_stand_info where vendor_id=${v0} and object_class=${v1} and standard_alarm_name like lower('%${v2}%')
mapper.insert: insert into tfa_alarm_conreason (fp0, fp1, fp2, fp3, user_id, time_stamp, confirm_reason, reason_type) values ('${fp0}', '${fp1}', '${fp2}', '${fp3}', '${user_id}', STR_TO_DATE('${time_stamp}','%Y-%m-%d %T'), '${textContent}', '${reason_type}')
mapper.select: Select user_id, time_stamp, confirm_reason, reason_type from tfa_alarm_conreason where fp0 = '${fp0}' and fp1 = '${fp1}' and fp2 = '${fp2}' and fp3 = '${fp3}'
select t.group_type_id, t.group_type_name from tai_group_type t

select * from (select t1.group_id, t1.group_name, t2.group_type_name, t2.group_type_id, row_number() over(order by t1.group_type_id) rownumber from tai_group_info t1, tai_group_type t2 where t1.group_type_id = t2.group_type_id and t1.group_type_id = #{groupTypeId}) where rownumber > #{start} and rownumber <= #{end}

select * from (select t1.circuit_id, t2.circuittype, t2.transcircuitno, t2.userlabel, row_number() over(order by group_id) rownumber from tai_circuitgroup t1 left join nrmdb.circuit t2 on t1.circuit_id = t2.int_id where t1.group_id = #{groupId}) where rownumber > #{start} and rownumber <= #{end}

select count(*) total from (select t1.circuit_id, t2.circuittype, t2.transcircuitno, t2.userlabel, row_number() over(order by group_id) rownumber from tai_circuitgroup t1 left join nrmdb.circuit t2 on t1.circuit_id = t2.int_id where t1.group_id = #{groupId} )
select int_id, userlabel from objects where object_class=508 and related_ne1= ${int_id}
select option_value from taw_option_info where trim(option_key)='${option_key}'
mapper.update: update taw_option_info set option_value='${option_value}' where option_key='${option_key}'
mapper.select: select type,zh_name from vendor_name
select field_name,condition_id from tfp_adv_matchcond where field_name in ('title_text','object_class','professional_type') and vendor_id=${vendorId}
select condition_id,field_name,vendor_id from tfp_adv_matchcond where field_name='title_text' or field_name='object_class' or field_name='professional_type' order by vendor_id
select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type >= 0 order by zh_name
select distinct region_id id,region_name txt from region_city_local order by region_name
select id, txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9 and valid = 1

Select '-' as regin_name, '-' as zh_name , '-' as type , Sum(a.act_alarm_num) as act_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(a.standard_alarm_num) /Sum(a.total_alarm_num),4)*100,'%') as standard_alarm_pct , Max(a.last_event_time) as last_event_time , Max(a.last_time_stamp) as last_time_stamp , Avg(A.avg_detect_duration) as avg_detect_duration, concat(round(Sum(A.detect_intime_num)/sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as detect_intime_pct , Sum(A.normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(A.normal_alarm_num)/Sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_yn_sum a where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_yn_sum) And a.sum_level=-2 Group by a.province_id

Select a.region_name , c.txt as zh_name , c.id, b.txt as type, b.id, Sum(a.act_alarm_num) as act_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(a.standard_alarm_num) /Sum(a.total_alarm_num),4)*100,'%') as standard_alarm_pct , Max(a.last_event_time) as last_event_time , Max(a.last_time_stamp) as last_time_stamp , Avg(A.avg_detect_duration) as avg_detect_duration, concat(round(Sum(A.detect_intime_num)/sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as detect_intime_pct , Sum(A.normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(A.normal_alarm_num)/Sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_yn_sum a left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) b on a.eqp_object_class=b.id left join (select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type >= 0 ) c on a.vendor_id=c.id where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_yn_sum) And a.sum_level=-2 And a.Eqp_object_class in (${type}) And a.vendor_id in (${zhName}) and a.region_id in (${city}) Group by a.region_id,a.region_name,b.txt,b.id,c.txt,c.id

Select a.region_name , b.txt as zh_name, '-'as type, b.id, Sum(a.act_alarm_num) as act_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(a.standard_alarm_num) /Sum(a.total_alarm_num),4)*100,'%') as standard_alarm_pct , Max(a.last_event_time) as last_event_time , Max(a.last_time_stamp) as last_time_stamp , Avg(A.avg_detect_duration) as avg_detect_duration, concat(round(Sum(A.detect_intime_num)/sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as detect_intime_pct , Sum(A.normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(A.normal_alarm_num)/Sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_yn_sum a left join (select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type >= 0 ) b on a.vendor_id=b.id where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_yn_sum) And a.sum_level=-2 And a.vendor_id in (${zhName}) And a.region_id in (${city}) Group by a.region_name,b.txt,b.id

Select '-' as regin_name , c.txt as zh_name , c.id, b.txt as type , b.id, Sum(a.act_alarm_num) as act_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(a.standard_alarm_num) /Sum(a.total_alarm_num),4)*100,'%') as standard_alarm_pct , Max(a.last_event_time) as last_event_time , Max(a.last_time_stamp) as last_time_stamp , Avg(A.avg_detect_duration) as avg_detect_duration, concat(round(Sum(A.detect_intime_num)/sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as detect_intime_pct , Sum(A.normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(A.normal_alarm_num)/Sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_yn_sum a left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) b on a.eqp_object_class=b.id left join (select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type >= 0 ) c on a.vendor_id=c.id where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_yn_sum) And a.sum_level=-2 And a.Eqp_object_class in (${type}) And a.vendor_id in (${zhName}) Group by c.txt,c.id,b.txt,b.id

Select a.region_name , '-' as zh_name, b.txt as type, b.id, Sum(a.act_alarm_num) as act_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(a.standard_alarm_num) /Sum(a.total_alarm_num),4)*100,'%') as standard_alarm_pct , Max(a.last_event_time) as last_event_time , Max(a.last_time_stamp) as last_time_stamp , Avg(A.avg_detect_duration) as avg_detect_duration, concat(round(Sum(A.detect_intime_num)/sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as detect_intime_pct , Sum(A.normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(A.normal_alarm_num)/Sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_yn_sum a left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) b on a.eqp_object_class=b.id where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_yn_sum) And a.sum_level=-2 And a.Eqp_object_class in (${type}) And a.region_id in (${city}) Group by a.region_name,b.txt,b.id

Select '-' as region_id, b.txt as zh_name , b.id, '-' as type , Sum(a.act_alarm_num) as act_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(a.standard_alarm_num) /Sum(a.total_alarm_num),4)*100,'%') as standard_alarm_pct , Max(a.last_event_time) as last_event_time , Max(a.last_time_stamp) as last_time_stamp , Avg(A.avg_detect_duration) as avg_detect_duration, concat(round(Sum(A.detect_intime_num)/sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as detect_intime_pct , Sum(A.normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(A.normal_alarm_num)/Sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_yn_sum a left join (select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type >= 0 ) b on a.vendor_id=b.id where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_yn_sum) And a.sum_level=-2 And a.vendor_id in (${zhName}) Group by a.vendor_id,b.txt，b.id

Select '-' as region_name , '-' as zh_name , b.txt as type , b.id, Sum(a.act_alarm_num) as act_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(a.standard_alarm_num) /Sum(a.total_alarm_num),4)*100,'%') as standard_alarm_pct , Max(a.last_event_time) as last_event_time , Max(a.last_time_stamp) as last_time_stamp , Avg(A.avg_detect_duration) as avg_detect_duration, concat(round(Sum(A.detect_intime_num)/sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as detect_intime_pct , Sum(A.normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(A.normal_alarm_num)/Sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_yn_sum a left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) b on a.eqp_object_class=b.id where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_yn_sum) And a.sum_level=-2 And a.Eqp_object_class in (${type}) Group by a.Eqp_object_class,b.txt,b.id

Select case when a.region_name ='99999' then '其它' else a.region_name end as region_name, '-' as zh_name , '-' as type , Sum(a.act_alarm_num) as act_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(a.standard_alarm_num) /Sum(a.total_alarm_num),4)*100,'%') as standard_alarm_pct , Max(a.last_event_time) as last_event_time , Max(a.last_time_stamp) as last_time_stamp , Avg(A.avg_detect_duration) as avg_detect_duration, concat(round(Sum(A.detect_intime_num)/sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as detect_intime_pct , Sum(A.normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num , concat(round(Sum(A.normal_alarm_num)/Sum(a.total_alarm_num2),4)*100,'%') as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_yn_sum a where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_yn_sum) And a.sum_level=-2 And a.region_id in (${city}) Group by a.region_name

Select b.ems_id , b.ems_name , b.vendor_name , b.cover_area , b.cover_device_range, b.id_address , nvl(a.act_alarm_num,0) act_alarm_num , nvl(round(a.standard_alarm_num/a.total_alarm_num,4)*100,0) as tandard_alarm_pct, a.last_event_time, a.last_time_stamp, nvl(round(A.avg_detect_duration,2),0) as avg_detect_duration , nvl(round(A.detect_intime_num/a.total_alarm_num2,4)*100,0) as detect_intime_pct, nvl(A.normal_alarm_num,0) normal_alarm_num, nvl(round(A.normal_alarm_num/a.total_alarm_num2,4)*100,0) as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_ynems_sum a Left join tfa_alarmview_ems_resource b On a.ems_id=b.ems_id where a.first_result = (select max(first_result) from tfa_alarmview_ynems_sum) And a.sum_level=-2
Select ems_id,ems_name from tfa_alarmview_ems_resource

select sum(total_alarm_num) as total_alarm_num From tfa_alarmview_ynems_sum Where first_result > STR_TO_DATE('${startTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') And first_result<= STR_TO_DATE('${endTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and sum_level=-1 and ${param}

select sum(normal_alarm_num) as normal_alarm_num From tfa_alarmview_ynems_sum Where first_result > STR_TO_DATE('${startTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') And first_result<= STR_TO_DATE('${endTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and sum_level=-1 and ${param}

select sum(normal_alarm_num)/sum(total_alarm_num2) as normal_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_ynems_sum Where first_result > STR_TO_DATE('${startTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') And first_result<= STR_TO_DATE('${endTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and sum_level=-1 and ${param}

select round(sum(standard_alarm_num)/sum(total_alarm_num ),2)*100 as standard_alarm_pct From tfa_alarmview_ynems_sum Where first_result > STR_TO_DATE('${startTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') And first_result<= STR_TO_DATE('${endTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and sum_level=-1 and ${param}

select round(avg(avg_detect_duration),2) as avg_detect_duration From tfa_alarmview_ynems_sum Where first_result > STR_TO_DATE('${startTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') And first_result<= STR_TO_DATE('${endTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and sum_level=-1 and ${param}

select round(sum (detect_intime_num)/sum(total_alarm_num2 ),2)*100 as detect_intime_pct From tfa_alarmview_ynems_sum Where first_result > STR_TO_DATE('${startTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') And first_result<= STR_TO_DATE('${endTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and sum_level=-1 and ${param}

Select A.first_result,---时间 b.ems_id ,-- 网管id b.ems_name ,--网管名称 b.vendor_name ,--网管厂家 b.cover_area , --网管覆盖范围 b.cover_device_range, --网管覆盖设备类型 b.id_address ,--网管IP地址 a.act_alarm_num ,--活动告警量 a.standard_alarm_num/a.total_alarm_num ,--标准化匹配成功率 a.last_event_time,--最后告警发生时间 a.last_time_stamp,-- 最后告警发现时间 A.avg_detect_duration ,--平均故障发现用时(分钟) A.detect_intime_num/a.total_alarm_num2,-- 告警呈现及时率 A.normal_alarm_num ,--规范告警数 A.normal_alarm_num/a.total_alarm_num2 --规范告警率 From tfa_alarmview_ynems_15_sum a Left join tfa_alarmview_ems_resource b On a.ems_id=b.ems_id where a.first_result >=STR_TO_DATE('${startTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and a.first_result < STR_TO_DATE('${endTime}','%Y-%m-%d %T') and a.sum_level=-1 and ${param} order by a.ems_id,a.first_result

SELECT IFNULL(IFNULL(msg_field,db_field),msg_field) AS db_field, col_name_zh, db_col_type, col_group, map_content, mem FROM tfm_alarm_col_info WHERE ( msg_field IS NOT NULL OR db_field = 'rule_name') AND col_disp_type = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=1317 and valid=1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=6 and valid=1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9 and valid=1
select type id,zh_name txt from vendor_name where type >= 0 order by zh_name
select distinct district_id,district_name from region_city
select distinct province_id,province_name from region_city
